description_long: This is a modern, rectangular single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with some sections of wood or dark accent panels visible inside. The interior layout is open, with visible partitions for rooms and hallways, and the flooring appears to be a mix of wood and tile. The rear and side facades are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and no prominent porch or decorative elements.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular house with a flat roof, large front windows, and a minimalist white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing large floor-to-ceiling windows and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid white walls and minimal window openings, highlighting privacy.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single door and small windows, showing the back entrance and more enclosed design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with solid walls and some interior room divisions visible from above.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade
